    "Periodic, low-frequency impact-like clicking and scraping sounds superimposed on the background noise",
    "Acoustic signature indicates localized spalling or a crack on the bearing raceway or rolling elements"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Schedule immediate vibration analysis to pinpoint the exact defect frequency (BPFO, BPFI, or BSF)",
    "Plan a bearing replacement during the next scheduled maintenance window to prevent catastrophic failure"
  ],
  "rationale": "The stethoscope recording reveals distinct, periodic impact-like clicking and rough scraping noises rather than a smooth, continuous hum. This is characteristic of a localized defect on a rolling element or raceway in a slow-turning bearing, indicating the component is degraded and requires replacement.",

    "SKF Bearing Damage and Failure Analysis Guide",
    "ISO 10816 / ISO 20816 (Mechanical vibration evaluation)"
  ]
